assertions.title: get-initial-route — updated routing matrix
assertions.reason: The focused get-initial-route Jest suite passed all 17 tests and covers the route matrix, but the contract evidence is not fully met because src/features/session/get-initial-route.test.ts still references the legacy routes CreatePin and Unlock explicitly.

summaryLines: Legacy-route scan matched CreatePin at line 222 and Unlock at line 223.

assertions.issues: src/features/session/get-initial-route.test.ts includes negative assertions expect(route).not.toBe('CreatePin') and expect(route).not.toBe('Unlock'), which contradicts the contract evidence requirement that the legacy route names are not referenced anywhere in the test file.

assertions.title: AppNavigator — gates screens by new state
assertions.reason: The navigator legacy-route scan returned no CreatePin/Unlock route or screen matches, and the focused AppNavigator Jest suite passed all 32 tests covering the new screen matrix and route names.

summaryLines: app-navigator legacy-route scan exit code: 1 (no matches)

assertions.title: AppNavigator — unavailable is a hard gate at every state
assertions.reason: The focused AppNavigator suite passed the unavailable/not-enrolled hard-gate cases, including the pending wallet-connect request case, and kept post-unlock navigator content out of the rendered tree.

summaryLines: Hard-gate cases passed for not-enrolled, unavailable, and unavailable+pendingWalletRequest.

assertions.title: AppNavigator — first-launch path Welcome → Setup → RecoveryPhrase → Main
assertions.reason: The sequential first-launch navigator test passed and exercised Welcome → BiometricSetup → RecoveryPhrase → Main without surfacing BiometricUnlock during the backup path.

summaryLines: First-launch path test passed: transitions Welcome → BiometricSetup → RecoveryPhrase → Main.

assertions.title: AppNavigator — relaunch locked → BiometricUnlock
assertions.reason: The relaunch-locked navigator test passed: initial render showed the unlock gate and flipping isLocked to false moved the app to Main.

summaryLines: Relaunch-locked test passed with Unlock gate first, then Main after unlock.

assertions.title: AppNavigator — relaunch unlocked → Main
assertions.reason: The relaunch-unlocked navigator test passed and rendered Main directly with no unlock or recovery-phrase screen showing during initial render.

summaryLines: Relaunch-unlocked test passed with Main rendered directly.

assertions.title: AppNavigator — invalidated routes to RecoveryRestore
assertions.reason: The invalidated-state navigator test passed and rendered RecoveryRestore while suppressing unlock, setup, and main-tab content.

summaryLines: Invalidated routing test passed with Restore wallet visible and gated alternatives absent.

assertions.title: Deep links during gated states do not break the gate
assertions.reason: The deep-link gating cases passed across BiometricUnavailable, BiometricSetup, RecoveryPhrase, RecoveryRestore, and BiometricUnlock, and the queued request surfaced only after the final gate cleared.

summaryLines: Deep-link gating tests passed for all gated states plus queued-request surfacing after unlock.
Queued wallet-connect error alert tests also passed without breaking the gate.

commandsRun.observation: PASS; get-initial-route matrix coverage passed with 17/17 tests.
PASS; line scan captured the full route matrix plus the legacy-route negative assertions in the test file.
FAIL; legacy route names are still referenced in the get-initial-route test file.
PASS; AppNavigator coverage passed with 32/32 tests across the routing matrix, hard gate, first-launch, relaunch, invalidation, and deep-link gating paths.
PASS; no legacy CreatePin/Unlock route names or screen imports were found in app-navigator.tsx.

commandsRun.command: rg -n -e '^\s*it(\.each)?\(' -e 'Open Settings' -e 'Get started' -e 'Enable biometric unlock' -e 'I\u2019ve saved it' -e 'Unlock with biometrics' -e 'Restore wallet' -e 'pending wallet-connect request' -e 'queued wallet-connect request surfaces once every gate is cleared' src/navigation/app-navigator.test.tsx
commandsRun.observation: PASS; line scan captured the hard-gate, first-launch, relaunch, invalidation, and deep-link gating test blocks and their anchor texts.

summary: Tested 8 navigation gating assertions on the jest-local surface: 7 passed, 1 failed, 0 blocked. VAL-UX-028 failed its evidence requirement because src/features/session/get-initial-route.test.ts still references the legacy CreatePin and Unlock routes, while VAL-UX-029/030/031/032/033/034/050 all passed with focused AppNavigator and getInitialRoute Jest coverage.
